posts.author: Mia (Mia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to be able to choose where new emailed items are placed on a board. I was having items that I emailed to a board placed at the top, but I was told that this was a glitch and the items are now placed at the bottom. I have over 20,000 emailed items on this board so having them at the top was very helpful and I would love to be able to choose to have them at the top instead of the bottom.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like to be able to choose if emailed items show up at the top of the group or the bottom of the group.
